description: Fix test suite portability so all tests pass on any host, not just the dev machine

userStories.title: Fix npx PATH issue in vitest worker threads
userStories.description: As a developer, I want `pnpm test` to pass on any Linux host without npx PATH issues in vitest workers.
acceptanceCriteria: All tests that currently fail with `spawnSync /bin/sh ENOENT` or `npx: not found` pass cleanly
The fix applies to all test files that call `execSync('npx prisma db push ...')` — replace with the full prisma binary path or use the `PATH` env from `process.env.PATH`

The pattern to use: `execSync('npx prisma db push --skip-generate', { env: { ...process.env }, ... })` already passes `process.env` — the issue is that `npx` resolves via PATH but vitest workers may not inherit it. Fix: replace `npx prisma` with `node_modules/.bin/prisma` (relative to the repo root) which is always present regardless of PATH. Use `path.join(process.cwd(), 'node_modules/.bin/prisma')` or the pattern `$(npm root)/.bin/prisma`.
userStories.notes: Failing tests all call `execSync('npx prisma db push --skip-generate', { env: { ...process.env }, stdio: 'pipe' })`. The fix is to replace `npx prisma` with the direct binary: `path.join(process.cwd(), 'node_modules/.bin/prisma')` which works regardless of PATH. Files to fix: tests/e2e/*.test.ts, tests/integration/tc-005.test.ts, tests/integration/tc-008.test.ts, tests/integration/tc-009.test.ts, tests/integration/tc-010.test.ts, tests/integration/tc-014.test.ts, tests/integration/tc-016.test.ts, tests/integration/tc-021.test.ts, tests/integration/tc-022.test.ts, tests/integration/tc-029.test.ts and any others with the same pattern. Use `grep -rn 'npx prisma' tests/` to find all occurrences.

userStories.title: Fix hardcoded absolute paths in tc-038 and tc-039
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tc-038 and tc-039 to work on any host, not just the dev machine at /home/ubuntu/.openclaw/workspace/claw-orchestrator/.
acceptanceCriteria: tc-038 and tc-039 pass on any host where the repo is checked out

Hardcoded path `/home/ubuntu/.openclaw/workspace/claw-orchestrator/docker/tenant-image/` replaced with a dynamic path using `path.resolve(__dirname, '../../docker/tenant-image/')` or equivalent `import.meta.url`-based resolution
userStories.notes: tc-038 reads `health-server.js` and tc-039 reads `message-server.js` from `docker/tenant-image/`. The current HEALTH_SERVER_PATH and MESSAGE_SERVER_PATH constants are hardcoded to `/home/ubuntu/.openclaw/workspace/claw-orchestrator/docker/tenant-image/...`. Fix: use `path.resolve(__dirname, '../../../docker/tenant-image/health-server.js')` (adjust relative levels based on file location in tests/integration/).

userStories.title: Verify full test suite passes and push
userStories.description: As a developer, I want `pnpm test` to exit 0 with all tests passing, committed and pushed.
acceptanceCriteria: All changes committed with descriptive message
userStories.notes: Target branch: ralph/fix-test-portability. After fixing, run `pnpm test` to confirm. Then commit and push.
